node.text:
Bone isn’t set after puberty, It’s still responding
#craniofacialstructure #craniology #MARPE
What should I do at 16?
@rydr555 yes he does
A regular tooth borne expander might still work at your age but I am unsure. Anyway focus on attaining growth hormone to max out your development and height.
@thaas21_ tooth borne will just tip the teeth, thumbpulling consistently would be more sufficient
So good 🔥🔥

Im 17 and currently have MARPE. I drink raw dairy and eat lots of lamb and grassfed beef while trying to maximize my fat intake. I sunbathe everyday for vitamin d and do GOATA exercises to align my posture. What else can i do to truly maximize my marpe experience and potential?

@jordan__b18 oh I know jawhacks I follow him. Personally I think it's not as easy for me at 21 to correct my Jaws with simple bite techniques etc. I guess you live in the US where all the good providers seem to be based.
@jordan__b18 what do you mean by do goata?
@primalgyal can you please send me your marpe guide? Thanks either way.

Mam pls reply
I am 20 yrs old and just finished invisalign treatment and wearing retainers now. I badly want to do thumbpulling adn mewing but they say that retainers resist the force and result . Wt to do i want to grow my facial bones.  Pls help me.
@rk12345269 i would honestly recommend not using retainers cause thatll restrict ur jaw from growing, but also on the flipside it could potentially mess up the “perfect smile” look
@rk12345269 DO NOT wear retainers
@rk12345269 get Reviv, eat whole raw steak with your hands (pulling motion for forward growth), chew on raw fat for fun, myo functional exercises, mewing 24/7 lots of sleep n SUN

Bones can change, but that's completely different from growth. Adult bone can remodel or distort, depending on the direction and force applied. MARPE does none of this, it is a semi surgical expander and not a natural growth or remodeling process. It mechanically distorts bone. I'm not judging it as good or bad, but it's important to be clear about what's happening.
@cranialdental doesn’t marpe allow new bone to fill in and then that bone remains permanent?
Truth bomb
¿Te puedo hacer una pregunta? Conoces la cuenta de mewology? Has visto su cambio? Todo con reviv y técnicas myo
@spanishfighter94 Avanzo bastante!!! Un saludo desde España
Pissed i cant afford marpe at 16 rn

@gosh.dmg If I were you I would do thumb pulling (and maybe follow  levio's exercises). I'm 42 and thumb pulling allowed me to get my tongue on my palate. Given your age, you could make great progress if you do it carefully.
The his snowbunny is🔥but why’d she fuk up her lips thoo🙄
@therealcoremaster lips are hormone responsive, when women are healthy lips will inflate, if they are unhealthy they will deflate
@primalgyal some reason I thought u injected the bottom lips mine naturally grew after this one nerd 🤓 girl bit mine 🫦 what’s your ethnicity!???
@primalgyal  I want to try facepulling and all that because I don’t have cheekbones. I was I to all this in like 2013/4 and then fell off sooooo hard… barely waking up again
@primalgyal it means bones can grow taller also?
@itz__singhz yes
